chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. Nos. D–5651 of 2020 and 885 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.31694/2022. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.20792/2022. 3. For hearing of Misc. No.1413/2021. 4. For hearing of Misc. No.24109/2020. 5. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025 Mr. Karim Khan, Advocate for the petitioner in C.P. No.D-5651 of 2020. Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioners a/w the petitioners in C.P. No.D-885 of 2021. Syed Vazarat Hussain Zaidi Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Faisal Mehmood Ghani, Advocate for K-Electric. Mr. M. Javed Khalid Rao, DAG. Mr. M. Ishaque Rajpar, Assistant Attorney General. ------------------------------- Respective learned counsel for the petitioners namely Mr. Karim Khan in C.P. No.D-5651 of 2020 and Mr. Ovais Ali Shah in C.P. No.D-885 of 2021 state that the petitions have served their purpose and, therefore, under instructions they are withdrawing these petitions simplicitor. Accordingly, both these petitions are dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. Office to place a copy of this order in the connected petition. J U D G E J U D G E Asif
